Discover Membership Privileges

Available through the Ontario Glass & Metal Association

The OGMA offers educational seminars, promotes awareness, rewards creativity and initiative, creates networking opportunities, and advocates integrity within the glass and metal industry.

Become a Member

2025 Spring Golf Tournament

For the first time, TPC Toronto at Osprey Valley will host OGMA’s Spring Golf Tournament. The tournament takes place on May 29, 2025. This stunning venue will also be home to the 2025 RBC Canadian Open in June!

We’ll be playing on the Hoot course, a beautiful layout that offers a mix of tough challenges and scoring opportunities from start to finish. The Hoot provides an 18-hole journey full of breathtaking views and risk-reward holes that test golfers’ mental and physical abilities. With its wide fairways, expansive waste bunkers, and approachable yet challenging greens, the Hoot promises a memorable experience for golfers of all skill levels. Be sure to book your group early!

Visit the Events page for more details.

OGMA Awards for Excellence in Design and Execution

The 2025 OGMA Awards for Excellence were awarded on May 30, 2025, at Top Glass Conference & Exhibits. Graziani + Corazza Architects was recognized for its design work on the Thirty Six Zorra project in Etobicoke, Ontario. Universal Aluminum Ltd. received the execution award for the Allan Gardens Conservatory project in Toronto, Ontario.

Visit the Awards page for more details.

OGMA President's Response to Tariff Threat

OGMA President Blake Sanders addresses the threat incoming tariffs will have on our industry.

Visit the OGMA News page to read his statement.

Prompt Payment Ontario - Ontario Construction Act - Trade Contractors Guide

OGMA has been an active participant in the Prompt Payment Ontario (PPO) initiative for the past six years, trade-related associations lobbied for improvements in the laws, liens, payment terms, and arbitration process related to construction contracts. Knowing the contents, and your rights and remedies, could be essential to the successful operation of your business.

To help you with this, PPO’s legal team took the Act and restated the key points in language we can understand. Click to download the Ontario Construction Act – Trade Contractors Guide for your reference.

About Us

The Ontario Glass & Metal Association is committed to its mandate to promote the glass and metal industry and to encourage an image of responsibility and integrity.
